creator: alo@louko.com
text:
ftp.freebsd.org resolves to 204.152.184.73 and 62.243.72.50

ftp://204.152.184.73/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ has had 200902 now for several days but ftp://62.243.72.50/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ doesn't have it yet.

Fix: 

Manually resolve ftp.freebsd.org addresses and then visit all servers to check for the lates snapshots.
How-To-Repeat: Visit ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/, ftp://204.152.184.73/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ and ftp://62.243.72.50/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ and compare the results.
